name: 3DMark
notes: Manual: user should tap through to Wild Life Extreme or Solar Bay; monkey only adds supplemental input/load variation and does not guarantee an official score run.

name: Geekbench 6
notes: Manual: use -SkipMonkey when you want the official CPU/GPU benchmark flow and score capture.

name: PPSSPP
notes: Meaningful sustained load still depends on a game already loaded; monkey only interacts within PPSSPP's UI/components.

name: RetroArch
notes: Meaningful sustained load still depends on a core/content already active; monkey is primarily for unattended UI activity and supplementary stress.
